subcodes.first_line: O thou who followest the Faith of Abraham, the Friend! He lit a lamp in the horizons whose light shineth until now [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اتبع مله ابراهیم حضرت خلیل شمعی در آفاق افروخت که انوارش الی الان در
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @Moses, @Manifestation of God as sun
